comment: Persistencia del chat migrada a PostgreSQL: ChatSession + ChatMessage entities, ChatRepositoryPort, PostgreSQLChatAdapter (create_session, get_session, list_sessions, save_message, get_message, list_messages), ChatSessionORM + ChatMessageORM, migración Alembic 003_add_chat_tables. chat_router usa Depends(get_chat_repo), elimina dicts en memoria. chat_ws_handler usa container.chat_repo, resuelve project_id via sesión. 8 tests unitarios. Suite total: 211 passed.
